verse_text: Evening and morning and midday, I shall tell; I shall proclaim, and He will hear my voice.

links.context: At the hour of prayer, the ninth hour: The apostles were observing regular Jewish hours of prayer, just as believers had done for centuries ([[PSA.54:18]]; [[DAN.6:11]]). The practice of praying at the first (6:00 a.m.), third (9:00 a.m.), sixth (12:00 noon), and ninth (3:00 p.m.) hours of the day carried over into the Church from the start. This practice continues to this day in the Orthodox Church in private prayers, in monasteries, and in some parishes. (See also 10:3, 9, 30.) 3:1-10 The apostles participate not only in preaching and teaching but in healing as well. The sacrament of healing manifests God's presence in the Church and confirms the message of the gospel.

symbolic.title: Returning to the Garden of Eden
